interpretation: Prior-only regime-filter validation used risk_adjusted selection on 1 fold(s). The top sample-gated selected-filter policy was order_25_2s_2c_risk_adjusted: selected-filter ROI -2.5%, unfiltered same-day ROI 5.1%, and ROI lift -7.6%. 1/1 fold(s) met the next-day sample gate and 0/1 both improved ROI and reduced drawdown. Only 1 fold(s) are available because selected-policy replay currently spans two forward days.
